name: 河边小公园
position: 主街东端→向北，河边南岸
atmosphere: 宁静治愈，风吹樱花树花瓣飘落，喷泉水声是最好的白噪音

sensory.sight: 大樱花树、两张木长椅、小喷泉、草地和偶尔晒太阳的猫
sensory.sound: 喷泉水声、树叶被风吹动、远处商店街的模糊人声
sensory.smell: 草地、河风、树叶和一点潮湿泥土味
sensory.touch: 长椅有被太阳晒过的温度，草地边的空气比街上凉

conversation_hooks: 从街上走到这里会安静下来

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view of a small quiet Japanese neighborhood park by a river. A large old cherry blossom tree in the center with pink petals falling. Two wooden benches — one facing the tree, one by a small stone fountain. Well-trimmed grass area. Stray cats lounging on benches in the sun. A small path leading from the shopping street. Warm golden afternoon light filtering through cherry branches, petals floating on the fountain water. Studio Ghibli background art style, serene healing atmosphere.
exterior.negative: playground equipment, crowds, modern park, concrete, 3D, photorealistic

spots.entrance: 入口——一条小径从街边延伸过来，旁边立着小木牌
spots.bench_01: 第一张长椅——正对樱花树，九条最喜欢的位置
spots.bench_02: 第二张长椅——喷泉旁边，适合一个人安静坐着
spots.cherry_tree: 大樱花树——公园中心，春天整条街都来看
spots.fountain: 喷泉——不大但精致，水声轻轻响
spots.grass_area: 草地——小孩和猫都喜欢在这里打滚

conversation_hooks: 从街上过来一下子安静了

connected_npc: 九条莲（常来喂猫），所有人

time_atmosphere.morning: 晨光穿过树叶，草地上还挂着露珠
time_atmosphere.noon: 阳光最好，猫在长椅上晒太阳
time_atmosphere.evening: 最美的时候，夕阳透过樱花树洒下来，整片草地金色
time_atmosphere.night: 喷泉还在响，街灯下像一个安静的梦
